title: Thomï؟½ Quadrijugï؟½.
content:
Tomï؟½s coach and six, whither in such haste going?
	 But a short journey, to his own undoing.

	آ آ آ آ Quadrijugis Thomas quo nunc se proripit ille?
	آ آ آ آ Abiit in celerem--brevis est via, nota--ruinam.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Jacob Bigelow delivers a powerful performance in "Thomï؟½ Quadrijugï؟½."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
